biological_replicate: Toxoplasma gondii tachyzoites were grown at 37 °C...
technical_replicate: three independent replicates were performed for each experiment.
experimental_design: three independent biological experiments were performed.
number_of_fractions: no fractionation or pre-fractionation is described.
number_of_technical_replicates: three independent replicates were performed for each experiment.
number_of_samples: 1 biological replicate and no fractions imply 1 sample.
